frames.name: Diplomatic Reset Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as a successful diplomatic reset after a period of strained relations, emphasizing forward momentum and renewed cooperation
frames.emphasis: Successful repair of damaged relationship, new agreements, and future-oriented partnership

frames.name: Business-First Frame
frames.description: Focuses on economic and trade aspects while downplaying or setting aside past diplomatic tensions
frames.emphasis: Economic cooperation and business dealings taking precedence over unresolved political issues

frames.name: Strategic Partnership Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes the comprehensive nature of cooperation across multiple sectors including defense, technology, and energy
frames.emphasis: Multi-sectoral cooperation, technological collaboration, and long-term strategic alignment

frames.name: Cautious Reconciliation Frame
frames.description: Acknowledges progress while highlighting ongoing tensions and unresolved issues beneath the surface
frames.emphasis: Qualified success with persistent underlying concerns and contradictory statements from officials

outlierPerspectives: BBC's detailed coverage of internal Canadian government contradictions regarding India's current threat level
NYT's characterization of the meeting as 'setting aside' rather than resolving the Nijjar killing issue
The Hindu's exclusive focus on Modi's positive response to Carney's social media post
missingContext: Specific details about what concessions or assurances each side made to enable this reset
Reaction from Sikh diaspora communities in Canada to the diplomatic rapprochement
Analysis of how this reset affects ongoing legal proceedings related to the Nijjar case
Economic motivations beyond US tariff avoidance that may be driving the reconciliation
Details about the timeline and specific terms of the uranium supply agreement
Broader geopolitical context of how this affects each country's relationships with other allies
